user.title: Connect to Aruba Instant AP
user.description: Enter the SNMP connection details for your Aruba Instant AP or virtual controller.

data.record_decimation: Recorder decimation (publish high-rate sensors every Nth poll; 1 = every poll)
Recorder decimation (publish high-rate sensors every Nth poll; 1 = every poll)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the IP address, community string, and that SNMP is enabled on the AP.
